objective_or_question: Test whether pre-task blue-light duration changes immediate recall
key_finding: Recall scores decreased across longer exposure conditions
limitations: Single-session simulated task with no delayed outcome

objective_or_question: Explore how researchers describe trustworthy AI-assisted reading
key_finding: Page-linked audit trails were described as the main condition for trust
limitations: Small synthetic convenience sample and no observational triangulation

objective_or_question: Measure document-classifier performance under domain shift
intervention_exposure_or_input: TF-IDF linear baseline and transformer classifier
timeframe: one benchmark run with five fixed seeds
key_finding: Performance declined under held-out domain evaluation and random splitting inflated results
limitations: Synthetic corpus and limited domain diversity
